mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or median 20-day forward returns during rate cuts are not significantly positive.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer spending, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Positive returns exceed 55% of triggered instances over a 10-year out-of-sample period.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates broad-based consumer demand recovery, generating positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive signals yield negative median returns over 60 days in > 60% of historical occurrences.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects strengthening manufacturing output and capacity utilization, leading to positive short-term S&P 500 momentum.
failure_condition: Signal loses predictive power with Rank IC below 0.01 during supply-constrained regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation forces expectations of tighter monetary policy, compressing equity valuations and producing negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Returns remain positive in > 60% of high-inflation trigger months across multiple decades.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising total nonfarm payrolls and falling unemployment rate confirms robust labor market tightening, supporting corporate earnings and positive equity returns.
failure_condition: Combined signal shows no statistical edge over baseline with p-value exceeding 0.10 in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Expanding real GDP growth directly correlates with corporate revenue expansion and profit margins, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Quarterly GDP growth shows zero correlation with subsequent 60-day index returns over a 20-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Contraction in industrial output alongside stagnant retail sales indicates a synchronized supply-demand breakdown, triggering negative equity returns.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO declines > 1% while RSAFS growth stalls
failure_condition: Signal fails to predict downturns with accuracy above 50% in out-of-sample backtests.
